params.to: Address that receives the LP tokens.

params.amount0Out: Amount of token0 to send out.
params.amount1Out: Amount of token1 to send out.
params.data: Non-empty triggers a flash-swap callback to `to`.

burn(address).notice: Remove liquidity and return underlying tokens.

mint(address).notice: Add liquidity and receive LP tokens.

skim(address).notice: Force balances to match reserves (rescue mistakenly sent tokens).
